_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in determining asset availability, capabilities, and limitations
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business question, balancing statistical rigor, time constraints, data availability, and audience comprehension capacity.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Ability AB-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-018 (AI, cosine: 0.540), AB-T-007 (AB, cosine: 0.521).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.453). Shared vocabulary: [availability]. NICE-only terms [asset, capabilities, determining, limitations, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, analytical, appropriate, audience, balancing, business] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.914, R=0.873). P exceeds R by 0.042 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Skill in determining asset availability, capabilities, and limitations" and "Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business questio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.541 > STS 0.453 (gap +0.088). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [availability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [availability]. NICE-only: [asset, capabilities, determining, limitations, skill]. WIDAI-only: [ability, analytical, appropriate, audience, balancing, business].
